jurisdiction: APCRDA — Andhra Pradesh Capital Region Development Authority (Amaravati capital region, including the Vijayawada-Guntur-Tenali-Mangalagiri belt)
regime: AP Building Rules 2017 (G.O.Ms.No.119 MA&UD) read with the APCRDA Act 2014, the CRDA Perspective Plan / Amaravati master plans and CRDA development promotion regulations
notes: Inherits all numeric bands (setbacks, heights, FAR, coverage, parking, RWH, corner rule, checklist) from ap-dpms-common - the AP Building Rules 2017 statewide values.

CRDA overlay: land use per the CRDA Perspective Plan / Amaravati master plan zones prevails over the statewide defaults; zoning regulations for the capital region can prescribe zone-specific setbacks, heights and urban-design controls - verify the plot's zone on the CRDA portal before relying on this pack. NEEDS VERIFICATION per plot.

Amaravati Land Pooling Scheme (LPS) returnable plots in the capital city carry their own development-control conditions attached to the LPS patta - those conditions override this pack. NEEDS VERIFICATION per plot.
Capital-city seed area, riverfront (Krishna) stretches and government-complex precincts may carry stricter height and facade controls - NEEDS VERIFICATION.
Advisory defaults for early design only - NOT legal advice and NOT a substitute for a sanctioned plan; verify on AP DPMS / the APCRDA online permission system.
